narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 2-A (precinct in Scioto County) has 297 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
